text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Oww. Jeez, didn't think splashing water on my face could hurt.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Is this what dry skin feels like? I don't 
think I'll be able to wash my face in a 
river comfortably like this…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Oh well, it's time for a journey anyway. 
It'll probably end up fixing itself if I eat 
something yummy.

That is to say, it appears Stay Gold's 
ad-hoc dry skin remedy had no effect.
